industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Dalian Thermal Power Co.,Ltd.
summary: Dalian Thermal Power Co.,Ltd. generates thermal power and heat in China. The company offers steam, hot water, and heat. It also operates five thermal power plants with a total installed capacity of 328.25 MW; and total heat supply of hot water boilers with 443.2 MW. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Dalian, China.
